hooks.command: Set-Location 'C:\MY WORK\my site\The Portfolio\xp-portfolio'; $s = git status --porcelain 2>$null; if ($s) { $d = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; git add -A; git commit -m "Auto-deploy: $d"; git push origin main; vercel --prod --yes }
hooks.statusMessage: Pushing to GitHub and deploying to Vercel...

hooks.command: powershell -Command "$p = $env:CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT; if ($p -match 'portfolio|website|landing page|UI|frontend|design|component|page|layout') { Write-Output 'SKILLS_ACTIVE: frontend-design + react-best-practices are AUTO-ENABLED for this task. Apply frontend-design principles (distinctive palette, subject-grounded choices, restraint, one signature element) and react-best-practices rules (no waterfalls, minimize bundle, memoize correctly, no inline components) to ALL code and design decisions.' }"
